# Oahu Map Legend Reposition — Script Edit Confirmation

**Date:** 2026-05-18
**Task:** Task 1 — Oahu Map Legend Repositioning (layout-only edit)
**Status:** Scripts edited. Figures must be regenerated by running the scripts.

## Changes Applied

| Element | Old | New |
|---------|-----|-----|
| Heat legend direction | horizontal-bottom | vertical-right |
| `guide_colorbar` barwidth | `unit(21, "cm")` | `unit(0.5, "cm")` |
| `guide_colorbar` barheight | `unit(0.45, "cm")` | `unit(5, "cm")` |
| `legend.position` | `"bottom"` | `"right"` |
| `legend.direction` | (not set) | `"vertical"` |
| Scale bar location | `"br"` (bottom-right) | `"tl"` (top-left) |
| Compass rose location | `"tr"` (top-right) | `"tl"` (top-left) |
| Compass rose `pad_y` | `unit(0.5, "cm")` | `unit(1.5, "cm")` — clusters below scale bar |

## Files Touched

### Bulk Script
- `Phase 6 Visualization/Bulk/R/9_Oahu_Opportunity_Cost_Map.R`
  - Affects output: `9.101_Oahu_Opportunity_Cost_Map_observed.png` (observed-only)
  - Affects output: `9.1_Oahu_Opportunity_Cost_Map.png` (MICE-pooled, R-only; bulk variant)

### Phase_6.R Master Script
- `Phase 6 Visualization/Phase_6.R` — `run_9_Oahu_Opportunity_Cost_Map()` function
  - Affects output: `Final_Thesis_Figures/9.141_Oahu_Opportunity_Cost_Map_GrandMean.png`
  - Affects output: `Final_Thesis_Figures/9.101_Oahu_Opportunity_Cost_Map_ObservedOnly.png`
- `Phase 6 Visualization/Phase_6.R` — `run_9b_Oahu_OC_Rural_USDA_Sensitivity()` function
  - Affects output: `Final_Thesis_Figures/9b.141_Oahu_OC_Map_Rural_USDA_Sensitivity_GrandMean.png`

## Data Unchanged

Per-course dollar values, color scheme, and all data are unmodified. This is a layout-only edit.
